tasks.subject: Task 1: Rename package regatta -> sverdrup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move src/regatta -> src/sverdrup and rewrite every regatta reference in code/config to sverdrup; leave historical docs untouched.

**Verify:** rg -ni 'regatta' --glob '!docs/**' --glob '!*.lock' . ; pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/", "pixi.toml", "tests/integration/config_osse.json", "tests/oracle/conftest.py", "README.md", "CLAUDE.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "rg -ni 'regatta' --glob '!docs/**' --glob '!*.lock' . ; pixi run test 2>&1 | tail -1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no regatta refs outside docs/lock", "70 passed 1 skipped", "python -m sverdrup exits 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Build backend + dynamic version (hatchling + hatch-vcs)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add [build-system], name=sverdrup, dynamic version from git tag via hatch-vcs.

**Verify:** pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -3 ; pixi run twine check dist/*

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -3 ; pixi run twine check dist/*", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wheel+sdist built with a version", "twine check PASSED", "_version.py gitignored"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Metadata + LICENSE + py.typed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add PyPI metadata, Apache-2.0 LICENSE, PEP 561 py.typed marker.

**Verify:** pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -2 ; unzip -l dist/*.whl | grep -E 'py.typed' ; pixi run twine check dist/*

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "LICENSE", "src/sverdrup/py.typed"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -2 ; unzip -l dist/*.whl | grep -E 'py.typed' ; pixi run twine check dist/*", "acceptanceCriteria": ["twine check PASSED", "py.typed in wheel", "LICENSE in sdist", "Apache-2.0 classifier"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Dependencies - core required + optional extras
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Declare required core deps (numpy/scipy/pyproj) + dask/io/all extras.

**Verify:** pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -2 ; unzip -p dist/*.whl '*/METADATA' | grep -E 'Requires-Dist|Provides-Extra'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -2 ; unzip -p dist/*.whl '*/METADATA' | grep -E 'Requires-Dist|Provides-Extra'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["numpy/scipy/pyproj Requires-Dist", "dask/io/all Provides-Extra", "twine check PASSED"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Release workflow (committed reference copy - Option B)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Author Trusted-Publishing workflow at docs/superpowers/ci/release.yml (pushable reference copy); document Option-B install in README.

**Verify:** pixi run yq '.' docs/superpowers/ci/release.yml > /dev/null && echo ok ; rg -n 'id-token|gh-action-pypi-publish|fetch-depth' docs/superpowers/ci/release.yml

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/ci/release.yml", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run yq '.' docs/superpowers/ci/release.yml > /dev/null && echo ok ; rg -n 'id-token|gh-action-pypi-publish|fetch-depth' docs/superpowers/ci/release.yml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid yaml", "tags v* + fetch-depth 0 + id-token write + gh-action-pypi-publish + environment pypi", "README Option-B note"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Build + clean-venv install smoke (USER GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptance criterion is independently re-validated with captured output.

**Goal:** Prove the built sverdrup wheel installs in a fresh venv, imports, exposes a version, ships py.typed, and [all] enables the pipeline.

**Verify:** rm -rf dist /tmp/sv && pixi run python -m build && twine check && venv install + import smoke + version + py.typed + [all] pipeline import.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "rm -rf dist /tmp/sv && pixi run python -m build 2>&1 | tail -2 && pixi run twine check dist/* && python -m venv /tmp/sv && /tmp/sv/bin/pip install -q $(ls dist/*.whl) && /tmp/sv/bin/python -c 'import sverdrup; from sverdrup.core.grid import GridSpec; print(\"ok\")'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["twine check PASSED", "clean-venv import ok", "version non-empty", "py.typed in wheel", "[all] enables pipeline import + python -m sverdrup exit 0"], "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Create + push public GitHub repo killett/sverdrup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create public killett/sverdrup and push main (no .github/workflows in tree so the repo-scoped token push is accepted); hand off user one-time steps.

**Verify:** gh repo view killett/sverdrup --json visibility,name ; git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh repo view killett/sverdrup --json visibility,name ; git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main", "acceptanceCriteria": ["repo PUBLIC named sverdrup", "main pushed", "no .github/workflows in tree"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
